content: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py (+ Tests/test_imageops.py). Should be additive; will keep changes localized to exif_transpose function. Let me know if you're touching ImageOps.py too.

agent1: finished strip_metadata param on my end (separate working copy, so no file clobbering risk). My changes: added strip_metadata kw-only bool to exif_transpose + _strip_all_metadata() helper that clears exif and pops exif/icc_profile/comment/xmp/XML:com.adobe.xmp/Raw profile keys from info. Applied regardless of whether an orientation transform occurred. Tests added: test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata, test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata_no_orientation, test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata_in_place. Writing patch.txt now.
